arts.ttl: Steve Cook comments, injustice and why Derby County should be fired up for QPR
arts.sum: Derby County will look to arrest a run of three straight defeats in the Championship tomorrow when they tackle QPR at Pride Park in the final game before the international break. The defeat to Norwich City last weekend ended Derby's 100 per cent home record in the Championship, but the strong smell of injustice still hangs in the air particularly after the PGMOL's response this week.

arts.ttl: QPR boss issues Derby County verdict amid 'angry' demand
arts.sum: Cifuentes is expecting a response from Derby and the Hoops boss said: "After a defeat, what we want to do is play the next game. QPR's start to the season has caused some friction among the fans and Cifuentes added: "I have said many times, we need to be angry when we lose games, it is fair.

arts.ttl: Defender who swapped Nottingham Forest for Derby County left in limbo after transfer decision
arts.sum: Former Derby County defender Kieron Freeman is facing uncertainty after Hartlepool United opted against extending his contract. "Hartlepool United can confirm the departure of Kieron Freeman upon the expiration of his short-term contract," said the club in a statement.

arts.ttl: ‘Narrow margins’ – Derby County vs QPR prediction: The72
arts.sum: The72's writers offer their Derby County vs QPR prediction ahead of their Championship clash on Saturday afternoon. The post ‘Narrow margins’ – Derby County vs QPR prediction: The72 appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: ‘Looking good’ – QPR boss shares selection update on key man ahead of Derby County trip
arts.sum: QPR boss Marti Cifuentes has said Ilias Chair ‘should’ be able to get more minutes this weekend. QPR’s… The post ‘Looking good’ – QPR boss shares selection update on key man ahead of Derby County trip appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Five ruled out for Derby County against Sunderland
arts.sum: Callum Elder, David Ozoh, Liam Thompson, Jake Rooney and Tom Barkhuizen are all nursing injuries and here is when they're expected to be back as the Rams prepare for what should be a fascinating encounter against the Black Cats. Like Elder, Ozoh will be out until after the next international break after suffering a hamstring strain.

arts.ttl: Derby County will disagree with 'only just' verdict as Norwich City 'hullabaloo' rumbles on
arts.sum: Former top Premier League referee Dermot Gallagher said he felt for the referee's assistant over the controversy surrounding Norwich City's first goal against Derby County at the weekend. The ball was also out of play for Norwich's third goal when Derby should have been awarded a corner but instead play was allowed to continue and Sainz wrapped up his hat-trick.

arts.ttl: Corey Blackett-Taylor challenge set as Paul Warne ponders tempting Derby County move
arts.sum: Richie Barker says Corey Blackett-Taylor's goal against Norwich will give the winger a boost after admitting he has had a stop-start career at Derby County. "There's no getting away from it, but the squad's pretty strong at the minute, and he had to even bide his time to get back on the bench.

arts.ttl: Sunderland boss makes triple Derby County point amid 'weaknesses' comment
arts.sum: Join our Derby County WhatsApp group to get the latest Rams headlines sent straight to your phone. Click this link to receive daily Derby County content and breaking news.

arts.ttl: Former Derby County ace ends two-year wait for transfer as deal branded a 'gamechanger'
arts.sum: Former Derby County ace Ravel Morrison has finally landed a new club after two years of waiting by signing for Dubai-based side Precision FC. A statement read: "We are beyond excited to welcome the incredible Ravel Morrison to Precision FC!
